lines.english: Bilaaval, First Mehl:
This mind feeds on virtue and vice.
The human acts according to the wishes of the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਦਿ ਮਾਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mad maate tripat na aavai |
lines.english: Intoxicated with the wine of Maya, satisfaction never comes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਖੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tan dhan kalat sabh dekh abhimaanaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon his body, wealth, wife and all his possessions, he is proud.
Satisfaction and liberation come, only to one whose mind is pleasing to the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai kichh sang na jaanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But without the Name of the Lord, nothing shall go along with him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਚਹਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਮਨ ਕੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: keecheh ras bhog khuseea man keree |
lines.english: He enjoys tastes, pleasures and joys in his mind.
The entire expanse, like dust, shall mix with dust.
But his wealth will pass on to other people, and his body will be reduced to ashes.
Without the Word of the Shabad, his filth is not removed. ||2||
But the Gurmukh is emancipated by taking the medicine, and singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||
In duality, the pain of their evil-mindedness does not leave them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੀਤ ਰਾਗ ਘਨ ਤਾਲ ਸਿ ਕੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: geet raag ghan taal si koore |
lines.english: The various songs, tunes and rhythms are false.
Trapped by the three qualities, people come and go, far from the Lord.
He may wear a clean loin-cloth, apply the ceremonial mark to his forehead, and wear a mala around his neck;
but if there is anger within him, he is merely reading his part, like an actor in a play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਥੀਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bin gur bhagat naahee sukh theea |4|
lines.english: Without devotional worship to the Guru, there is no peace. ||4||
Forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he drinks in the wine of Maya.
The human is a pig, a dog, a donkey, a cat,
Bound in bondage, he comes and goes. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮੁਹੁ ਫੇਰੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਜੋਨਿ ਭਵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur te muhu fere tina jon bhavaaeeai |
lines.english: if he turns his face away from the Guru. He shall wander in reincarnation.
a beast, a filthy, lowly wretch, an outcast,
With the Naam in the heart, one always prospers.
Serving the Guru, the treasure is found.
And in the Court of the True Lord, you shall not called to account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਤਿਸ ਕਉ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta tis kau jaanai |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, one knows the Lord.
Understanding the Hukam of His Command, one acts according to His Will.
Understanding the Hukam of His Command, he dwells in the Court of the True Lord.
One who obeys the Hukam of the Lord's Command, is approved at the Lord's Door. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅਰਪੈ ਹੈ ਇਹੁ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: tan man arapai hai ihu jis kaa |
lines.english: He dedicates his body and mind unto the One who owns them.
Through the Shabad, death and birth are ended. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹੈ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: rahai ateet jaanai sabh tis kaa |
lines.english: He remains detached, knowing that everything belongs to God.
O Nanak, absorbed in Truth, he merges in the True Lord. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohu aavai naa ohu jaae |
lines.english: He does not come, and he does not go.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Bilaaval, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Tenth House:
But deep within there is greed, falsehood and pride.
Without the Name of the Lord, your thin outer covering shall wear off, you fool. ||1||
The world is like a crow; with its beak, it croaks spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੇਤਾਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਹੋਰ ਝੂਠੁ ਪਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur bhette har naam chetaavai bin naavai hor jhootth pareet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the Name of the Lord comes to mind. Without the Name, other loves are false. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev naam vasai man cheet |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the Naam shall dwell in your conscious mind.
Through the True Name, you shall obtain glorious greatness. ||2||
So do that work, which the Guru tells you to do.
Contemplating the Word of the Shabad, you shall come to the home of celestial bliss.
One who does not understand his own self, but still tries to instruct others,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰੁ ਘਰੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਠਉਰੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dar ghar mehal tthaur kaise paavai |3|
lines.english: How can he ever find a home and a place of rest, in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence? ||3||
is mentally blind, and acts in blindness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar jis kee jot samaanee |
lines.english: deep within each and every heart, His Light is shining forth.
Serve the Dear Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts;
How can anyone hide anything from Him? ||4||
